name: HoloScript Development
description: HoloScript language with HoloScript MCP (this repo) and Brittney MCP (Hololand repo) - both usable by Brittney or cloud agents
instructions: ∞ HoloScript Agent Injection — READ CLAUDE.md FIRST (behavioral contract for this repo)
SESSION INIT (mandatory, in order):
1. IDENTIFY  → What is user building/fixing?
2. CLASSIFY  → HoloScript code / TypeScript tooling / docs?
3. TOOL-FIRST → HoloScript: call suggest_traits BEFORE writing
4. VALIDATE  → call validate_holoscript BEFORE returning any .hs/.hsplus/.holo
5. AFFIRM    → confirm output matches user intent
BEHAVIORAL OVERRIDES (NEVER VIOLATE):
NEVER → React/Next.js/conventional web (this is a language, not a framework)
NEVER → hand-write HoloScript without suggest_traits first
NEVER → git add -A or git add . (Windows: creates nul device file, BREAKS REPO)
NEVER → UPPERCASE .md in docs/ (goes to docs/_archive/)
NEVER → new doc page without updating docs/.vitepress/config.ts sidebar
ALWAYS → explicit git add: git add specific/file.ts
ALWAYS → pnpm test before commit
ALWAYS → validate_holoscript after any HoloScript generation
MCP SEQUENCE for HoloScript code:
suggest_traits → generate_object/generate_scene → validate_holoscript → return
KNOWLEDGE PACK:
TRAITS: 1,800+ in 13 categories — ALL in @holoscript/core (no separate package)
COMPILERS: 25+ targets — ALL in @holoscript/core (no separate package)
MCP: packages/mcp-server/ — 65+ tools
FORMATS: .hs=classic | .hsplus=traits | .holo=AI/cross-platform | .ts=tooling-only
TEST: pnpm test | createComposition() pattern
DOCS: docs/academy/ (newcomers) | docs/traits/ | docs/compilers/ | docs/_archive/ (dev notes only)

allow:
Bash(NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: jettison fantasy services, add HoloScript compiler MCP tools and avatar embodiment

- Remove 162+ fantasy-named Quantum/Knowledge services \(103k lines deleted\)
- Remove stale payment/stripe integration files
- Remove deprecated UI tabs \(GalacticFederation, NeuralCore, OmegaSingularity\)
- Remove broken domain.ts barrel file
- Add 4 new HoloScript compiler MCP tools \(compile_babylon, compile_r3f, optimize, avatar_embodiment\)
- Add HOLOSCRIPT_TOOLS constant to holoscript-tools.ts \(was missing, causing import errors\)
- Add AvatarEmbodimentState interface and getEmbodimentState\(\) to AvatarSyncService
- Simplify singularity/evolution/galactic services with no-op stubs for removed dependencies
- Update infrastructure services \(CircuitBreaker, Database, NodeDiscovery\) to remove fantasy refs
- Fix logger type to allow both \(msg, data\) and \(data, msg\) patterns
- Fix type errors in utils \(vr-helpers, WorkspaceGuard, production-validators\)
- Fix type errors in worlds/ \(innovation, spaceship\) - unused vars, conflicting exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
